text: At Sun Life Skincare, we understand that what you do defines who you are
and that many of your activities expose your skin to the damaging rays of the sun.
With the thinning ozone and increased pollution that leaves your skin under greater attack
and with less ability to combat the effects of the sun,
we realize that your skin needs all the protection it can get.
Apply V-De-Soleil as a nourishing and hydrating foundation for your skin
to give it that extra help it needs to counteract the effects of the sun.
Apply your favorite sunscreen and then do the things that matter to you with more peace of mind with V-De-Soleil.
Apply V-De-Soleil nighttime cream after your skin has been exposed to the sun
to provide nourishing botanicals and vitamins to assist in hydrating and replenishing your skin
and to prevent dryness and flaking.
Your skin defines you more than anything else.
Protect your skin by using V-De-Soleil, your life in the sun.
